description: Reference image catalog for SGU visual similarity comparisons
notes: Each entry maps a reference image to a game camera angle/view. Screenshots should be named to match the entry 'name' field.

references.name: gate-room-front
references.description: Gate room head-on view — gate centered, full room visible, low camera angle. The definitive establishing shot of the Destiny gate room.

camera_hint.position: Center of room, ~2m height, facing gate directly
camera_hint.notes: Low angle looking slightly up at the gate. Room pillars and ceiling visible. Dark moody lighting.

references.name: gate-active
references.description: Active stargate with event horizon — blue-white rippling wormhole, bright light spilling onto floor. Floor markings visible.

camera_hint.position: Floor level, ~15m back from gate, centered
camera_hint.notes: Looking straight at the active gate. Strong blue-white light floods the room. Yellow floor markers visible.

references.name: gate-closeup
references.description: Close-up of active gate event horizon — glowing chevrons, ripple effect visible through the ring.

camera_hint.notes: Tight shot on the gate ring and event horizon. Chevron glow visible.

references.name: destiny-exterior
references.description: Destiny ship exterior in space — full ship visible with characteristic wing shape and hull detail.

camera_hint.position: External camera, ship fills 60% of frame
camera_hint.notes: Ship against star field. Blue/white light from nearby star illuminating hull.

references.name: destiny-ftl-exit
references.description: Destiny dropping out of FTL — ship visible with FTL trail, dark space, glowing hull lights.

camera_hint.position: External camera, side angle showing full length
camera_hint.notes: Dark space background. Ship hull lights and FTL glow visible.

references.name: observation-deck
references.description: Observation deck interior during FTL — large window, blue streaking light, silhouetted figure, organic pillars.

camera_hint.position: Behind the viewer position, looking toward window
camera_hint.notes: Very blue/cyan lighting from FTL window. Organic curved pillars. Dark foreground furniture.

references.name: hatch-control
references.description: Destiny hatch control panel — Ancient tech prop, red/yellow status indicator, worn metallic surface.

camera_hint.notes: Detail shot of Ancient technology. Worn, used aesthetic. Green/amber indicator lights.

references.name: kino-dispenser
references.description: Kino dispenser unit — wall-mounted mechanical device with two Kino spheres visible in dispensing slot.

camera_hint.notes: Metallic device with industrial/Ancient aesthetic. Pipes, slots, worn metal textures.

references.name: destiny-3q-view
references.description: Destiny 3D model three-quarter view — detailed hull geometry, panel lines, forward section visible.

camera_hint.notes: Clean studio-style shot of ship model. Good reference for hull topology.

references.name: destiny-front-view
references.description: Destiny 3D model front view — head-on, showing characteristic flat disc shape and wing spread.

camera_hint.position: Directly in front, level with ship center
camera_hint.notes: Head-on shot showing disc shape and wing geometry.
